title: Match
description: A football match with scheduling, score, and status information.

competition_id.description: ID of the competition this match belongs to.

stage_id.description: ID of the stage within the competition.

status.description: Match status: 0=not started, 1=first half, 2=half time, 3=second half, 4=extra time, 5=penalties, -1=finished, -2=postponed, -3=cancelled.

home_score.description: Goals scored by the home team.

away_score.description: Goals scored by the away team.

scheduled.description: Unix timestamp of scheduled match kick-off time.
